short_description_of_the_course.label: Short Description of the Course

co_requisites.label: Co-requisites
co_requisites.value:
Systems Programming (H)
Level 3 Team Project  (one of either:  Team Project (H), Team Project (H) Minor, Team Project ESE or Team Project 3)

timetable_and_length_and_frequency_of_te.label: Timetable and length and frequency of teaching sessions
timetable_and_length_and_frequency_of_te.value: Weekly full day laboratory in conjunction with Team Project.

course_aims.label: Course Aims

intended_learning_outcomes_of_course.label: Intended Learning Outcomes of Course

description_of_summative_assessment.label: Description of Summative Assessment
description_of_summative_assessment.value: This course is taught in conjunction with the Team Project. Practical assessment of material will be undertaken in the Team Project. Assessment of student understanding of the theoretical material presented in PSD (H) will be done through fortnightly class tests (20%) and a final written exam (80%).

formative_assessment_feedback.label: Formative Assessment & Feedback
formative_assessment_feedback.value: Students will receive on-going verbal feedback through interactions with the course lecturers during the scheduled laboratories regarding their professional practice as software engineers.
